history.content:
<thought>
I am at the top-left interior cell facing right. The cell directly ahead is lava, so moving forward is unsafe. The only open path from here is downward, so I should turn right to face down.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am now facing down, and the cell directly below me is open floor. Since the path downward is safe and necessary to get around the lava column, I should move forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The cell directly below me is open floor, and continuing downward is the safe route toward the open corridor near the bottom. I should keep moving forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am still facing down, and the cell below is open. Moving farther down continues the safe path toward the bottom passage that leads right to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am facing down with an open floor cell directly ahead. Advancing one more step brings me into the horizontal corridor I can use to head toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am now at the corridor row and still facing down, but the cell ahead is lava, so I should not move forward. To follow the safe corridor toward the goal on the right, I need to face right.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing right along a clear hallway. Moving forward safely advances me toward the open passage near the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am facing right and the path ahead is clear. Continuing forward moves me along the safe corridor toward the opening on the far right.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The cell directly ahead is open, and I should keep moving right toward the only safe route down near the far-right side.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am still facing right with open floor ahead. Advancing continues toward the right-side passage that leads to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The path ahead remains clear, and I need to continue right to reach the vertical opening near the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am one step left of the right-side corridor. Moving forward places me at the opening above the safe path down toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at the right edge facing right, so moving forward would hit a wall. I need to face down to enter the corridor toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am aligned with the safe vertical corridor on the right, and the cell below is open. Moving forward will bring me closer to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am one row above the goal and still in the safe right-side corridor, with an open cell directly below. Moving forward reaches the goal row.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
